title: EEG Signatures and Effects of Mindfulness Approaches in Adolescents With Nonsuicidal Self-Injury.

assets.abstract: Nonsuicidal self-injury (NSSI) is a recurring behavior most prevalent among adolescents in which one intentionally harms one's tissues and organs without the intent of death, which has a complex pathophysiology and lacks established interventions. As NSSI has been linked to deficits in cognitive control, mindfulness training that enhances this process may be beneficial. In this study, using electroencephalography (EEG), we examined the neural mechanisms underpinning NSSI and the impact of mindfu
